builders.name: Andrej Karpathy
builders.bio: I like to train large deep neural nets. Previously Director of AI @ Tesla, founding team @ OpenAI, PhD @ Stanford.

tweets.text: Drafted a blog post, used an LLM to improve the argument over 4 hours, then asked it to argue the opposite and it demolished the entire argument. LLMs are extremely competent in arguing almost any direction - useful for forming opinions.
False equivalence is a trap - carefully bet on a very small set of things. Don't hedge. Set triggers to monitor if wrong. Tests to double down early if more right.
Seeing great uptake on Gemini - give it a try this weekend!
